text: Hovering over the "upload image" button in the evaluate feedback form should show the tooltip "Attach image(s)"

proposedTasks.title: Add tooltip to image upload button in Evaluate feedback form
proposedTasks.description: In the Evaluate phase feedback submission form, the image-upload button currently has no tooltip on hover. Add a tooltip reading "Attach image(s)" that appears on mouseenter/focus and disappears on mouseleave/blur. Acceptance criteria: (1) Hovering over the upload-image button displays a tooltip with the text "Attach image(s)". (2) Tooltip is accessible (aria-label or title attribute). (3) Tooltip dismisses on mouse leave and on Escape key.

taskTitles: Add tooltip to image upload button in Evaluate feedback form
